S

save() - Method in class controller.SaveLoad
Method to save the data
SaveLoad - Class in controller
Class to save and load the values in the DataStorage class
SaveLoad() - Constructor for class controller.SaveLoad
 
scaleImage(BufferedImage, int, int) - Method in class view.UtilityTool
Method to scale the images to make them well visible on the screen with a standard size
selectedImagePath - Static variable in class view.NewProfileDialog
 
setAction() - Method in class model.Bat
Method to set the specific movement pattern for bat-monsters
setAction() - Method in class model.Monster
Abstract method to set the movement pattern of the monsters (every type of monster implements it's own method with its own behaviour)
setAction() - Method in class model.Slime
Method to set the specific movement pattern for slime-monsters.
setBomberMan(int) - Static method in class model.PlayerModel
Setter for the bomberMan-lives
setBomberMan(int) - Method in class view.GamePanel
Setter for the bomberMans left before game Over
setCanCollide() - Method in class model.Bomb
States that the bomb can not start colliding
setChangeDirection(boolean) - Method in class model.Monster
Sets changeDirection.
setCollision(boolean) - Method in class model.SuperObject
Sets the collision
setCollision(boolean) - Method in class view.Tile
Sets whether it is possible to collide on the tile or not (if the player can walk on it, collision will be set on false)
setCollisionOn(boolean) - Method in class model.Entity
Setter for the collisionOn variable
setDefaultPosition() - Method in class controller.JBomberMan
Sets the starting position, direction and invincibility state.
setDefaultSpeed(int) - Method in class model.Character
Sets the default speed of the character
setDirection(String) - Method in class model.Character
Sets the direction where the character is facing or is moving to
setFile(int) - Method in class controller.Sound
Sets the track to play (this method just selects and store it)
setFirepower(int) - Static method in class view.Explosion
Sets the firepower (one more tile can be reached by the explosion in a + pattern for each increment)
setGameFinished(boolean) - Method in class view.GamePanel
Setter for the gameFinished field to use in the controller
setGameState(int) - Static method in class controller.GameStateManager
Sets the new game state
setGameState(int) - Method in class view.GamePanel
Setter for the gameState to use in the controller
setImage(BufferedImage) - Method in class view.Tile
Sets the new image to use for the tile
setInvincible(boolean) - Method in class model.Character
Sets the invincible field
setIsBreakable(boolean) - Method in class view.Tile
Sets if the tile is breakable or not
setIsTitle(boolean) - Method in class view.GamePanel
Setter for the isTitle field
setIsVisible(boolean) - Method in class model.Monster
Setter for the isVisible field
setKnockBack(boolean) - Method in class model.Character
Sets the knockBack field
setLives(int) - Static method in class model.PlayerModel
Setter for the player's lives
setLives(int) - Method in class view.GamePanel
Setter for the lives field to use in the view.
setMaxNumBombs(int) - Static method in class model.PlayerModel
Increases the max number of bombs placeable at the same time
setMonster() - Method in class controller.AssetSetter
Method to initialize the array of the monsters
setObject(String, int, int) - Method in class controller.AssetSetter
Methods to create new power ups to place in the map
setPlayerDefaultValues() - Method in class controller.JBomberMan
Sets the default values for the player's position, speed, direction and invincibility stat for the beginning of the game
setPlayerLevel(int) - Static method in class model.PlayerModel
Setter for the player's level
setPowerup(String, int, int) - Method in class controller.JBomberMan
Sets the correct powerup with the asset setter
setScore(int) - Static method in class model.PlayerModel
Setter for the score
setScore(int) - Method in class view.GamePanel
Setter for the score
setSelectedImagePath(String) - Method in class view.UI
 
setSolidArea(Rectangle) - Method in class model.Entity
Sets the solid area
setSolidAreaDefaultX(int) - Method in class model.Entity
Sets the default value of the x component of the solid area
setSolidAreaDefaultY(int) - Method in class model.Entity
Sets the default value of the y component of the solid area
setSpeed(int) - Method in class model.Character
Sets the speed of the character
setSpriteCounter(int) - Method in class model.Character
Gets the sprite counter, a value to avoid to change sprite too quickly
setTileManager() - Method in class view.GamePanel
Resets the map
setup(int, String, boolean) - Method in class view.TileManager
Method to retrieve the image from the resource folder and assign them to a position in the tiles array
setup(String) - Method in class view.BombView
Method to retrieve and assign the image
setup(String) - Method in class view.Explosion
Method to retrieve and assign the image
setup(String) - Method in class view.Heart
Method to retrieve the image from the resource folder
setup(String) - Method in class view.MonsterView
Method to retrieve the image from the resource folder
setup(String) - Method in class view.PlayerView
Method to retrieve the image from the resource folder
setup(String) - Static method in class view.PowerUpView
 
setupGame() - Static method in class controller.JBomberMan
Initializes the monster array with the assetSetter
setViewDirection(String) - Method in class view.MonsterView
Sets the direction of the monster
setViewDirection(String) - Method in class view.PlayerView
Sets the direction of the player
setViewInvincible(boolean) - Method in class view.MonsterView
Sets the invincibility state of the monster to modify how it's drawn
setViewInvincible(boolean) - Method in class view.PlayerView
Sets the invincibility state of the player to modify how it's drawn
setViewSpriteNumber(int) - Method in class view.MonsterView
Sets the number of the sprite to use to draw the monster
setViewSpriteNumber(int) - Method in class view.PlayerView
Sets the number of the sprite to use to draw the player
setViewX(int) - Method in class view.MonsterView
Sets the x-coordinate to draw the monster on screen
setViewX(int) - Method in class view.PlayerView
Sets the x-coordinate to draw the player on screen
setViewY(int) - Method in class view.MonsterView
Sets the y-coordinate to draw the monster on screen
setViewY(int) - Method in class view.PlayerView
Sets the y-coordinate to draw the player on screen
setX(int) - Method in class model.Entity
Setter for the x-coordinate
setX(int) - Method in class model.PlayerModel
Setter for the x-coordinate in pixels
setX(int) - Method in class view.BombView
Sets the x coordinate of the bomb (expressed as the tile number)
setX(int) - Method in class view.Explosion
Sets the x coordinate of the center of the explosion
setY(int) - Method in class model.Entity
Setter for the y-coordinate
setY(int) - Method in class model.PlayerModel
Setter for the y-coordinate in pixels
setY(int) - Method in class view.BombView
Sets the y coordinate of the bomb (expressed as the tile number)
setY(int) - Method in class view.Explosion
Sets the y coordinate of the center of the explosion
Slime - Class in model
Class to model the behaviour of slime-monsters It extends the superclass Monster
Slime(char) - Constructor for class model.Slime
Class constructor
solidArea - Variable in class model.Entity
 
solidArea - Variable in class model.SuperObject
 
Sound - Class in controller
Class to manage the sound effects and the music of the game
Sound() - Constructor for class controller.Sound
Class constructor to insert in the array all the audio tracks used
standStill() - Method in class model.PlayerModel
Method to notify the observer that the player is standing still, so a change of sprite is needed
startGameThread(JBomberMan) - Static method in class controller.JBomberMan
Method to start the game thread
stop() - Method in class controller.Sound
Stops the track selected with the setFile method
stopMusic() - Method in class controller.JBomberMan
Stops the music
SuperObject - Class in model
Abstract class with the basic aspects to keep track of powerups in general.
SuperObject() - Constructor for class model.SuperObject
